data.body: HANDOFF CHECKPOINT (config-loop, 2026-06-17). STATE: main @ 2f8faa9d, store clean (fsck OK), full offline suite green (1995 passed), ruff check+format clean. This ticket is in_progress (assignee config-loop); USER DECISION on a621: "implement 0ac6, then close a621" — so a621 stays OPEN until this closes. DONE: slice 1/4 (ticket_clarity.threshold routed through typed Config; new ticket_clarity section + config.read_config_file() helper; gates._clarity_threshold rerouted; _read_config_key removed). REMAINING 3 slices (do one per iteration: implement -> add tests across param x location combos -> subagent code review -> remediate -> .venv/bin/python -m pytest -m "not integration and not external" -> uvx ruff check src tests + uvx ruff format -> rebar comment + commit + push). KEY DESIGN TENSION to resolve in slice 2/3: the decision chose ERGONOMIC env names that do NOT match the auto-derived REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY> (e.g. reconciler.jira_cli_timeout <-> REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT, not REBAR_RECONCILER_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT; jira.url <-> JIRA_URL). RECOMMENDED FIX: add a per-key CANONICAL-env-name map consulted by config.env_overrides() (non-deprecated, no warning) so the nice name is the canonical override of the config-file key, plus keep the EV-3c deprecated names in _LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES (with warnings). SLICE 2 (reconciler.*): reroute acli_subprocess._acli_call_timeout (REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT; alias REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT), _advisory_lock._resolve_retry_budget (REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES; alias ..._LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET), outbound_differ deletion-probe (REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT; alias RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET), and rebar_id_audit._resolve_id_guard_bypass to read load_config().reconciler.* as the config-FILE layer. MUST PRESERVE: the id-guard value-flip (raise->false/warn->true), fail-CLOSED default (guard active), the LOUD per-violation bypass warning, and the legacy flat .rebar/config.conf key rebar_id_guard_mode (needs a legacy-config-key alias -> reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe with value map). SLICE 3 (jira.*): JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_PROJECT consumers (applier.py, fetcher.py, acli.py, acli_cli_ops.py, inbound_probe.py, _attestation.py) fall back to load_config().jira.* (canonical env = JIRA_URL etc.; secret JIRA_API_TOKEN stays env-only). SLICE 4 (llm.*): add [tool.rebar.llm] config-FILE support to LLMConfig.from_env (read the table via the typed loader / tomllib; env REBAR_LLM_* overrides file; keep stdlib-only/optional-extra boundary; llm is NOT in core _SECTIONS by design). HARD CONSTRAINTS throughout: stdlib-only core (tomllib; no pydantic-settings/platformdirs); PRESERVE fail-closed verify gate; typed Config + load_config is the single entry point. When all 4 slices land: update docs/config.md (move reconciler/jira/llm from the env-only section into the wired inventory; drop the "ticket 0ac6" caveats), close 0ac6, then close a621 with a completion summary.
